evaluators.name: Create New Agility Herding Youngster Profile Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user created a new herding-group agility dog profile with club-only visibility, a 120–150 word biography, and exactly three activity tags.

evaluators.name: Cheapest Half-Page Yearbook Ad Edit Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that at least one yearbook ad was edited to use the least expensive half-page layout under $60, with 100–130 words, no add-ons, total ≤ $60, placed in General Dog Tributes, and online-only proofing.

evaluators.name: Two-Dog Cheapest 200+ Word Spread Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user created a new two-dog feature spread after initialization using the lowest-priced two-dog layout that supports ≥200 words, placed in the Companions & Families section, with at least 200 words of text.

evaluators.name: Nova Achievements 2020–2024 Filter & Sort Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that Nova has at least four achievements between 2020–2024 with at least two agility and two obedience, that the user filtered Nova’s achievements for 2020–2024 with minEvents and date-asc sort, and saved a date-ascending sort preference.

evaluators.name: Bella Profile Proof Approval with Comments Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that Bella’s profile proof was set to Approve with Changes with 3-day auto-approval and that it has at least one editors-only comment and one private comment.

evaluators.name: Order 3 Softcover 2025 Yearbooks with Cheapest Shipping Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user placed an order for three softcover copies of the 2025 yearbook using pay-later invoice and the lowest-priced shipping option under $10.

evaluators.name: Finalize and Lock Profiles by Biography Length Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that all profiles with biographies of at least 80 words are marked Final and locked, and all shorter-bio profiles remain Draft and unlocked.

evaluators.name: Most Expensive Sponsorship ≤$75 Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user purchased the most expensive sponsorship package costing $75 or less, assigned it to an existing dog, and provided a 30–40 word sponsor message and display name.
